data.title: SonicStrategy Expands Token Holdings and Launches Institutional Validator
data.description:

An announcement from DigiMax Global Inc. ( (TSE:SPTZ) ) is now available.

SonicStrategy has expanded its holdings to over 6 million Sonic tokens and launched its first institutional-grade validator on the Sonic blockchain. This strategic move not only strengthens its position in the blockchain industry but also opens avenues for scalable recurring revenue and increased yield through collaborations and DeFi strategies.

More about DigiMax Global Inc.

Spetz Inc., operating as SonicStrategy, is a company that provides investors with access to the Sonic blockchain ecosystem through staking infrastructure and decentralized finance (DeFi) strategies. It serves as a public-market gateway to the Sonic network, offering compliant exposure to digital asset accumulation and blockchain operations.

data.title: Spectra Systems’ Substrate Powers Brazil’s New High-Security Banknote
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Spectra Systems ( (GB:SPSY) ) just unveiled an update.

Spectra Systems Corporation announced that its sustainably sourced FusionTM substrate is a key component of a new high-security polymer banknote produced by Casa Da Moeda Do Brazil. This banknote, unveiled at the High Security Printing event in Rio de Janeiro, features the highest security measures to date, including Spectra’s machine-readable covert substrate and Oberthur Fiduciaire’s Kryptonome security feature. The collaboration with industry leaders such as Oberthur Fiduciaire, SICPA, and Koenig & Bauer highlights Spectra’s significant role in advancing banknote security technology.

More about Spectra Systems

Spectra Systems Corporation operates in the security and authentication industry, specializing in machine-readable substrates and security features for banknotes and other secure documents. The company focuses on developing innovative and sustainable solutions for high-security printing applications.

Average Trading Volume: 86,343

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £97.65M

An announcement from Hdfc Bank ( (HDB) ) is now available.

On June 12, 2025, HDFC Bank issued a statement addressing false and defamatory allegations made by the trustees of Lilavati Kirtilal Mehta Medical Trust against the bank and its MD & CEO. The bank categorically denied these claims, emphasizing its compliance with legal standards and ethical governance. HDFC Bank announced its intention to pursue legal action to protect its reputation and urged the public and media to critically assess the unfounded allegations, which it views as attempts to tarnish its image.

It is known for its strong governance and adherence to ethical standards, focusing on maintaining its reputation as one of India’s leading banks.

Green Tea Group Limited ( (HK:6831) ) has provided an update.

Green Tea Group Limited announced the conclusion of its stabilization period related to its Global Offering, which ended on June 12, 2025. The stabilization actions, managed by CMB International Global Markets Limited, included over-allocations and successive purchases of shares, but the Over-allotment Option was not exercised and subsequently lapsed. This marks a significant step in the company’s financial operations, potentially affecting its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about Green Tea Group Limited

Green Tea Group Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability, operating in the financial sector with a focus on global offerings and securities.

data.title: Pyrum Innovations AG Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Pyrum Innovations AG ( (DE:PYR) ).

Pyrum Innovations AG has announced its 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for July 24th in Dillingen/Saar, Germany. The company, known for its groundbreaking recycling technology, continues to expand its operations and influence in the recycling sector, with recent site expansions and ongoing research into new waste streams. This announcement highlights Pyrum’s ongoing commitment to innovation and sustainability, reinforcing its position as a leader in the recycling industry.

More about Pyrum Innovations AG

Pyrum Innovations AG is a pioneer in the recycling industry, specializing in the innovative thermolysis technology for end-of-life tyres and plastics. This technology allows for the recycling of these materials with minimal emissions, producing high-quality outputs like thermolysis oil and recovered Carbon Black. These products are utilized by major companies such as BASF, Continental, and Schwalbe, contributing to a closed material cycle and aligning with climate sustainability goals. The company operates multiple plants and holds respected certifications, underscoring its commitment to sustainable and renewable solutions.

data.title: Eco Wave Power Advances U.S. Wave Energy Project in Los Angeles
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An announcement from Eco Wave Power Global ( (WAVE) ) is now available.

On June 12, 2025, Eco Wave Power Global announced a significant milestone in its first U.S. pilot project at the Port of Los Angeles, marking the company’s entry into the U.S. market. The project involves the production of wave energy floaters, with completion expected by the end of June and installation in July. This initiative is part of a broader strategy to integrate scalable, cost-effective wave power into U.S. ports and coastal infrastructure, supported by Shell’s Marine Renewable Program. The project underscores Eco Wave Power’s commitment to local sourcing and job creation, and aims to demonstrate the viability of wave energy as a clean electricity source.

The most recent analyst rating on (WAVE) stock is a Buy with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eco Wave Power Global stock, see the WAVE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WAVE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WAVE is a Neutral.

Eco Wave Power’s overall stock score is driven down by its poor financial performance and valuation metrics. Technical analysis shows weak momentum, further impacting the score. Positive developments from the earnings call provide some hope, but the financial challenges remain the most significant factor.

To see Spark’s full report on WAVE stock, click here.

More about Eco Wave Power Global

Eco Wave Power Global AB (publ) is a leading onshore wave energy company that specializes in converting ocean and sea waves into sustainable electricity through its patented, smart, and cost-efficient technology. The company is committed to combating climate change and operates the first grid-connected wave energy project in Israel. It is expanding globally with projects planned in the U.S., Taiwan, and Portugal, and has received support from prestigious institutions such as the European Union Regional Development Fund and the United Nations.

Haydale Graphene ( (GB:HAYD) ) has provided an announcement.

Haydale Graphene Industries PLC has announced significant commercial progress for its JustHeat product line, a low-power, graphene-based heating system. Following its launch in April 2025, JustHeat has achieved UL certification, allowing sales in the US and Canada, and has secured commitments for pilot installations in the UK. Strategic distribution agreements with Quidos Protect and Jersey Energy Technologies aim to expand market reach, while ongoing discussions with potential partners in various countries indicate growing interest. The company’s cost-reduction efforts and strategic partnerships position JustHeat for a scaled commercial rollout across multiple geographies.
